page_metadata.biotools__summary: HLAreporter (HLA reporter) is a novel tool  for HLA typing from NGS data based on read-mapping using a comprehensive reference panel containing all known HLA alleles, followed by de novo assembly of the gene-specific short reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HLAreporter (HLA reporter) is a novel tool  for HLA typing from NGS data based on read-mapping using a comprehensive reference panel containing all known HLA alleles, followed by de novo assembly of the gene-specific short reads.
